text:
Prediction: No

Reasoning: The current visit record primarily details trauma, orthopedic injuries (splenectomy, closed fractures of pubis, metacarpals, tibia/fibula), and associated complications like liver cirrhosis and alcohol abuse. There is no explicit mention of hypercholesterolemia, hyperlipidemia, or any other specific lipid disorder diagnosis or ongoing management related to lipid metabolism in the provided records. Therefore, based strictly on the evidence provided, there is no strong and explicit basis to predict that a diagnosis of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will be coded in the next hospital visit.
